Manages boot FPGA bitstream and manufacturing data, including color, RTC frequency, and model info.


## Files
- **[boot_fpga.c](boot_fpga.c.md)**: Manages the reading and writing of the boot FPGA bitstream to the manufacturing info flash region.
- **[mfg_info.c](mfg_info.c.md)**: Manages manufacturing data for a device, including color, RTC frequency, and model information.
- **[mfg_private.h](mfg_private.h.md)**: Functions for writing and checking the boot FPGA bitstream status.
